informationCondition: Each task receives every route card below, the same five-minute budget, and no project-name hint in the task text.

routes.job: Identify a promoted confmap decoder owner, affected parent siblings, and a repository-relative Go source location before an upgrade is merged.
routes.useWhen: A custom Collector config anonymously embeds or squashes a helper with Unmarshal(*confmap.Conf) error and the parent has sibling fields.
routes.doNotUseWhen: Only runtime validity, general Go lint, schema generation, automatic rewriting, or proof of decoder semantics is needed.
routes.inputOutput: Local Go package patterns in; deterministic OCP001 text, JSON, or SARIF and exit 0/1/2 out.
routes.runtimeLicense: Go 1.26+ on Linux/macOS; MIT; analysis is network-free after dependencies are present.

routes.job: Ask a built Collector distribution whether a concrete configuration decodes successfully before startup.
routes.useWhen: Failure presence and invalid runtime keys matter more than Go source ownership.
routes.doNotUseWhen: A promoted method owner or source-level migration location must be identified.
routes.inputOutput: Collector YAML in; validation success or a runtime decoding error out.
routes.install: Build or obtain the exact Collector distribution used in production.
routes.runtimeLicense: Distribution-specific component set; Apache-2.0 Collector source.

routes.job: Run standard correctness, style, and bug checks over Go packages.
routes.useWhen: The request is a general Go audit rather than a confmap promotion diagnosis.
routes.doNotUseWhen: A Collector-specific promoted decoder and sibling relationship is the required output.
routes.inputOutput: Go packages in; standard Go vet or Staticcheck diagnostics out.
routes.install: Use Go 1.26.5 vet and checksum-pinned Staticcheck 2026.1 (v0.7.0).
routes.runtimeLicense: Go toolchain plus MIT-licensed Staticcheck distribution.

routes.job: Generate JSON Schema from exported Go configuration structs during schema migration work.
routes.useWhen: The desired artifact is a configuration schema, not runtime validation or method-promotion ownership.
routes.doNotUseWhen: The task is to explain which custom decoder receives a parent map.
routes.inputOutput: Go config structs in; generated JSON or YAML Schema out.
routes.install: Use checksum-pinned OpenTelemetry Collector schemagen v0.157.0.
